rules: High Tc is insufficient without ambient access or a credible retention mechanism.
Engineerable control variables outrank vague protocol claims.
Structural memory or non-reconstructive tuning outranks simple pressure reduction.
Routes with at least two usable knobs are discovery-richer than one-point benchmarks.
failure_modes: A future breakthrough may come from a route with poor current controllability but easy synthesis.
Hg1223 may have a broader protocol window than the carried literature currently surfaces.
Thin-film nickelate sensitivity may reflect sample pathology rather than a robust tuning route.
carry_forward: Pressure quench remains top for benchmark proximity.
Strain plus oxygen control remains top for discovery richness.
Hydrides remain negative controls unless new evidence appears.
